word: H6257 - עָתַד - ʻâthad - aw-thad' - Make fit

sections.paragraph:
Original: עתד

Transliteration: ‛âthad

Phonetic: aw-thad'

BDB Definition:

  1. to be ready, make ready, prepare
    1. (Piel) to make ready
    2. (Hithpael) to be prepared

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 1719

Part(s) of speech: Verb
